command: fastp -i raw_data/SRR1039509_1.fastq.gz -I raw_data/SRR1039509_2.fastq.gz -o trimmed/SRR1039509_1_trimmed.fastq.gz -O trimmed/SRR1039509_2_trimmed.fastq.gz --detect_adapter_for_pe --qualified_quality_phred 20 --length_required 20 --html qc/SRR1039509_fastp.html --json qc/SRR1039509_fastp.json --thread 4
